tasks.label: Compile and run Java
tasks.command: cp "${file}" "${workspaceFolder}/TempJavaProgram.java" && javac "${workspaceFolder}/TempJavaProgram.java" && java -cp "${workspaceFolder}" TempJavaProgram > "${workspaceFolder}/output.txt" 2>&1 && rm "${workspaceFolder}/TempJavaProgram.class" && rm "${workspaceFolder}/TempJavaProgram.java"
